results.diagnosis: Attio REST API returned 401 Unauthorized with body indicating the API key was wrong length (keys must be 64 chars). The 20:10 run failed and triggered the staleness validator on the cached snapshot. The very next scheduled run at 20:12 succeeded cleanly and refreshed the snapshot — prior 20:00 / 19:00 / 18:00 runs were also healthy. Most likely transient env-var read race or partial key load on the 20:10 invocation. Self-recovered without intervention.
results.pattern_observed: First failure — 20:10 run failed 401, next run at 20:12 succeeded; prior 20:00/19:00/18:00 runs all healthy. Self-resolved transient.
results.slack_text: launchd-debugger: attio-snapshot-refresh hit transient AUTH failure at 2026-05-09 20:10 ET — 401 Unauthorized from Attio API (key reported wrong length, must be 64 chars). SELF-RECOVERED: next run 2 min later (20:12) succeeded cleanly, snapshot now fresh (12 active deals, 138 closed). Prior 2000/1900 runs healthy. Likely transient env-var read race or partial key load. No action required, but flag for awareness — if it recurs, refresh ATTIO_API_KEY in scripts/.env.launchd from Attio admin panel. Log: /home/ubuntu/projects/Sapling/logs/scheduled/attio-snapshot-refresh-2026-05-09-2010.log

results.error_signature: VALIDATOR FAILED — overriding skill exit code
results.diagnosis: Skill audit passed cleanly (WEEKLY REVIEW: 10 rows, no Tabled/Killed lingering, rank sequential). The POST_RUN_CHECK validator (scripts/validate_nightly_tracker_audit_integrity.py) failed with: 'gog sheets get failed: missing --account (or set GOG_ACCOUNT, set default via gog auth manage, or store exactly one token)'. Confirmed: GOG_ACCOUNT is NOT defined in scripts/.env.launchd, scripts/run-skill.sh does not export it before the POST_RUN_CHECK, and the validator's gog subprocess call (line 33) does not pass --account. The validator works under interactive shells where a default token is configured but fails under launchd. Either the validator needs --account baked into its subprocess args, or GOG_ACCOUNT needs to be added to scripts/.env.launchd.
results.pattern_observed: First observed failure — only one nightly-tracker-audit log exists in logs/scheduled/. Validator was added recently under the universal POST_RUN_CHECK doctrine (2026-05-04) and likely never exercised in the launchd env path before tonight.
results.slack_text: launchd-debugger: nightly-tracker-audit FAILED — CODE_BUG. Skill audit passed (WEEKLY REVIEW: 10 rows, no Tabled/Killed, rank sequential), but POST_RUN_CHECK validator exited 2: 'gog sheets get failed: missing --account'. Confirmed: GOG_ACCOUNT is NOT defined in scripts/.env.launchd, run-skill.sh does not export it, and validate_nightly_tracker_audit_integrity.py does not pass --account to its gog subprocess call. Recommended: patch scripts/validate_nightly_tracker_audit_integrity.py to add '--account', 'kay.s@greenwichandbarrow.com' to the subprocess args, OR add GOG_ACCOUNT=kay.s@greenwichandbarrow.com to scripts/.env.launchd. Log: /home/ubuntu/projects/Sapling/logs/scheduled/nightly-tracker-audit-2026-05-09-2330.log
